chapters.title: Welcome to Dart 🎯
chapters.description: Start your journey! Learn what Dart is, how to comment, and how to store data in variables.

chapters.title: Logic & Operators ⏱️
chapters.description: Make your code think! Learn to use math, compare values, and write if/else conditions.

chapters.title: Loops & Repetition 🔄
chapters.description: Don't repeat yourself. Master for loops, while loops, and do-while loops to automate tasks.

chapters.title: Functions & Scope 🛠️
chapters.description: Build reusable blocks of code. Learn parameters, return values, and arrow functions.

chapters.title: Collections 📦
chapters.description: Store multiple items at once using Lists, Sets, and Maps.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Basics 🏗️
chapters.description: Model the real world with Classes, Objects, Constructors, and Methods.

chapters.title: Advanced OOP 🧬
chapters.description: Unlock superpowers with Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstract classes, and Mixins.

chapters.title: Null Safety & Errors 🛡️
chapters.description: Write crash-free apps! Master null safety (?), late variables, and try/catch blocks.

chapters.title: Asynchronous Dart ⏳
chapters.description: Handle time-consuming tasks gracefully using Futures and async/await.

chapters.title: Streams & Mastery 🌊
chapters.description: Handle continuous data flows with Streams and Generators. Achieve Dart mastery!
